---
title: "08. зҘһеҝ—жғ…еҝ—дёҺжўҰ"
subtitle: "Spirit, Emotion, Dream, and Cognitive State"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 8
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How spirit, emotion, dream, and cognitive disturbance appear as high-level bodily modes rather than detached immaterial phenomena."
---

**Chapters:** зҙ й—®13, зҙ й—®75-76, зҙ й—®81, зҒөжһў08, зҒөжһў43, зҒөжһў50, зҒөжһў69, зҒөжһў72, зҒөжһў80  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `modular tower inverse limit`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_08_spirit_emotion_dream_cognitive_state.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
